messages.content:
Translate to Thai (with romanization)

"For my King, I give my life."
"สำหรับพระมหากษัตริย์ของฉัน ฉันให้ชีวิตของฉัน" (sǎm-ràp prá-má-hǎa-gà-sàt-krit khǎ̌ng chǎn chǎ̌i chī-wít kǎwng chǎn)
"He is the emissary of the gods. The bridge between Earth and Heaven."
เขาเป็นเหล่าสาวกเทพ เหมือนสะพานระหว่างโลกและสวรรค์ (khǎo bpen lâo sǎao-gòk-thep meuuan sà-pǎan rá-wàng lók-láe sà-wan)
"Kingdom of Siam"
"ราชอาณาจักรสยาม" (râat-chá-aa-naa-jàk sà-yaam)
"I know no fear, I only know content."
"ฉันไม่รู้จักความกลัว เราเพียงรู้จักความพอใจ" (chǎn mâi rúu jàk kwaam-glua, rao pîang rúu jàk kwaam-por-jai)

Translate to Latin

“I know no fear, I only know content.”
"Nescio timorem, sola contentum scio."

Translate all subsequent text to Brazilian Portuguese

"I know no fear. I only know content."
"Eu não conheço o medo. Eu só conheço a satisfação."
"Autogun Cultist"
"Cultista Autogun"
"Keeper of Secrets"
"Guardião dos Segredos"
"He just wants to sleep, my son."
"Ele só quer dormir, meu filho."
"Age of Dinosaurs"
"Era dos Dinossauros"
"Chaos Space Marine"
"Marine Espacial Caótico"
"New Age Retro Hippie"
"Novo Hippie Retrô da Era"

Translate to English

"きままなにいさん"

"Kimapana Nii-san". 

(Note: This is not a meaningful phrase in Japanese. The given phrase seems to be misspelled and doesn't make sense as a standalone phrase. However, the romanization is accurate.)
"ぜったいあんぜんカプセル"

"Zettai Anzen Kapuseru" 

(Note: this translates to "Absolute Safety Capsule" in English. This is the name of a fictional product from a popular Japanese anime.)
